title: Oxalis hayi
intro: Oxalis hayi, also known as the rock crassula or stone flower, is a type of succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The health benefits of Oxalis hayi include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Oxalis hayi include teas and infusions, as well as tinctures and capsules, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
